notes: Redesigns Resource Manager around dedicated Prompt, Skill, and MCP workflows with compact type-specific cards.
Adds online Skill sync with SKILL.md frontmatter parsing, read-only upstream content, source links, and manual updates.
Adds searchable trigger groups that can activate resources by workspace path or repository address.
Adds multi-select resource deletion, native desktop context menus, and clearer save and copy feedback.
Adds searchable clipboard groups and user-defined categories based on type, regular expressions, source application, and length.
Keeps large clipboard histories responsive with lazy list construction and provides a return-to-top action.
Rewrites the MCP access prompt so an Agent can install, reload, verify, and test dingdong_notify directly.
Stops macOS notifications from bouncing the Dock icon while preserving DingDong sounds and unread state.
Publishes separate Apple Silicon and Intel macOS packages; Intel macOS and Windows packages remain marked beta.
